title: Target Identification Network
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Tin}}
'''Target Identification Network''', or '''TIN''', was a sophisticated surveillance system and combat package based on those used in [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]].

Using a system of [[piercing targeting laser]]s, TIN projected a [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] bubble ranged at 30 meters around the vehicle it was mounted. Combining advanced audio listening antennae with [[thermosensor]]s, TIN was able to offer vehicle crews a precise picture of the battlefield. The most useful application for wise vehicle commanders was to identify a target with TIN that would maximize psychological impact while minimizing physical destruction.

[[HAVr A9 Floating Fortress/Legends|HAVr A9 Floating Fortresses]] used TIN.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
